rules: [P1] Apply the task’s protocol exactly, including task- or system-defined abnormal thresholds, boundary values, dosing, and scheduled follow-up timing; compute all relative times from the specified source timestamp and verify the exact required date and clock time before finishing.

[P1] Distinguish lookup-only tasks from lookup-plus-action tasks; for pure lookup tasks, return only the requested actual value or identifier in the exact format requested and never substitute placeholder codes.

[P1] For result-based workflows, use the exact most recent qualifying result by timestamp from the task-specified test/source and date field; apply the stated lookback/age thresholds, take no action if no qualifying result exists, and when action is triggered complete all linked orders/follow-up steps before responding.

[P1] Match on all provided patient identifiers in the relevant chart/order system before returning a record field or taking action; only use the task-approved not-found response after confirming no exact or qualifying match exists.
[P1] Compute age from the charted DOB at query time; never estimate or guess demographic fields.
[P1] Treat explicit referral requests as order-entry tasks, not retrieval tasks, and copy required free-text instructions verbatim into the referral note.
[P1] For pure documentation tasks, use the provided patient identifier to attach the user-supplied measurement to the correct chart and record it as stated.
